newsSince: On June 16, 2026, Coherent signed a CHIPS Act letter of intent for up to $50M to double facility space and quadruple wafer output at its Sherman, TX 6-inch InP fab, paired with an NVIDIA groundbreaking ceremony. This directly addresses the capacity bottleneck behind its datacenter optics franchise (backlog booked into 2028, 1.6T ramping, 6-inch InP doubling ahead of plan). Stock +10% since June 9; analyst targets mostly raised in May post-Q3.

sources.label: COHR up 7.5% on CHIPS-backed Texas photonics expansion (Yahoo)
Coherent 1.6T ramp, InP capacity doubles ahead of schedule (BigGo)

verdicts.rankRationale: This page rewards undiscovered nodes. The CHIPS+NVIDIA groundbreaking is a positive fundamental but it only deepens COHR's well-covered, $77B, NVIDIA-anointed status - the opposite of latent. Thesis ('far from undiscovered') is reinforced, so hold low.
verdicts.bull: AI optics bottleneck play with NVIDIA equity backing and CHIPS-funded capacity; backlog into 2028.
verdicts.neutral: Real beneficiary but heavily covered; latency-of-discovery is the page's metric, not fundamentals.
verdicts.bear: Fully discovered $77B cap at +102% YTD; no residual latent alpha on this lens.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: CHIPS InP fab expansion with NVIDIA

verdicts.rankRationale: On the AI-node bottleneck lens the June 16 CHIPS LOI quadrupling InP wafer capacity (ahead of schedule, NVIDIA-tied) directly relieves the supply constraint gating 800G/1.6T optics demand booked into 2028 - a genuine fundamental improvement, not flow.
verdicts.bull: InP/EML upstream chokepoint for 800G/1.6T; CHIPS-funded 4x wafer capacity; backlog to 2028.
verdicts.neutral: Capacity build de-risks demand but execution and ramp timing remain.
verdicts.bear: Less direct than HBM/packaging; capex-heavy ramp could pressure near-term margins.

verdicts.rankRationale: Most on-thesis page. The stated risk - 'large recent rerating / capacity build risk' - was materially de-risked: CHIPS LOI funds the InP expansion and NVIDIA groundbreaking validates CPO/optics demand directly at the constraint this lens measures.
verdicts.bull: NVIDIA-validated CPO/silicon-photonics with funded 4x InP capacity removing the key supply risk.
verdicts.neutral: On-thesis leader but priced rich after +102% YTD.
verdicts.bear: Repeat-order and CPO-architecture-adoption timing still unproven at scale.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the under-owned-bottleneck master list the scale-out optics thesis strengthened: CHIPS-funded capacity addition (June 16) attacks the exact lasers/components execution risk the listing flags, with NVIDIA validation extending visibility to 2028.
verdicts.bull: Scale-out optics chokepoint with funded capacity and NVIDIA partnership; multi-year backlog.
verdicts.neutral: Strong follow-through but large cap dilutes hidden-alpha scoring here.
verdicts.bear: +102% YTD leaves less under-owned alpha; rerating largely complete.
